2317630.name: SOUND FORGE Audio Studio 17 Steam Edition
2317630.description:
A complete software solution for all audio tasks: SOUND FORGE Audio Studio 17 offers an impressive range of creative possibilities. Record podcasts in the highest quality, cut audio material fast and create and edit video soundtracks using professional effects. Digitize your old recordings and modify audio files using restoration and mastering tools for clean sound. SOUND FORGE Audio Studio 17 offers the convenience and ease of use you've come to expect combined with innovative features that offer great efficiency and speed for professional audio results.

Highlights



The essential features in SOUND FORGE Audio Studio 17 Steam Edition:

  • Audio editing, recording, restoration & mastering
  • NEW! Achieve improved workflows using Loudness Meter
  • NEW! Perfect playback of your audio projects with Mono Compatibility Meter
  • NEW! Enhanced support and stability for VST plug-ins
  • NEW! Make basic operations easy and automable with coreFX Utility
  • NEW! Start your work even quicker with our streamlined Onboarding Process
  • modernEQ & modernReverb
  • wizardFX Suite with professional effects plug-ins
  • Truncate Silence option for removing pauses
  • Export Wizard for Audible, iTunes and Amazon audiobooks in accordance with ACX standards
  • Redesigned Visualization Meter

New features in version 17:


Loudness Meter
The new Loudness meter displays the loudness of your audio files in a continuous graph in relation to the timeline and as numerical values. Enjoy support for EBU R 128 and ITU-R BS.1770-4 formats thanks to true-peak analysis in dbTP that can be configured using simple presets, all of which is displayed with color coding to simplify your workflow.


Mono Compatibility Meter
Guarantee perfect audio playback using the fast and easy mono compatibility meter. Track compatibility and identify any issues with vivid, accurate visualizations. Ensure your mix translates flawlessly in any playback system with the easy to use mono compatibility meter.


VST Enhancements
Benefit from enhanced support for VST plug-ins. This update will increase performance, compatibility, and stability for your music production. Use more of your favorite VST extensions without any loss in performance for an even better and faster workflow.


coreFX Utility
Streamline your editing process with our sleek and modern plug-in that enables essential editing tasks with the ability to automate parameters. Benefit from the massive collection of essential high-quality tools for professional editing.


Optimized Onboarding
Get started quick and easy with a comprehensive multi-language documentation, interactive tutorials and a simplified setup process. Understanding and using the most important features has never been simpler.
2317630.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
